user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship Store
fields.description: Visit the iconic flagship store at Queen and Bay to pick up Canadian souvenirs and gifts before heading to the CN Tower.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants to add a souvenir stop in the morning before the CN Tower. Position 1 places it after the 7:30 AM breakfast and before the 10:00 AM CN Tower EdgeWalk.
